历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 3728 → 7784 → 6523 → 9855 → 8681, showing a significant overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6127 positions from 2021 to 2024, and a rebound of about 1174 positions in 2025 compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of about 8681; the university's enrollment plan in Liaoning Province for Physics Category was 6 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 5 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 5 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8, an increase of 3 from 2025, a 60% expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 93rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2025 → 81st in 2026, with a continuous slight upward trend, steadily improving overall strength and recognition; in 2022, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, while in 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee controversy), with overall public opinion stable; Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot), with moderate application attention; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country); Physics Category enrollment majors include Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data), Management Science and Engineering, etc., combined with computer/big data directions, broadening the application scope for science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer/big data direction, with 2024 major popularity for computer-related fields assessed as 'recommended' and electronic information/communication as 'highly recommended and hot', with related directions having high popularity; in Liaoning Province, the number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 146,800 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase from 143,400 in 2025, with a small rise in the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward trend in historical rankings, the 60% enrollment expansion in 2026, the rising university ranking, the high popularity of new engineering majors like big data, and the slight increase in the total number of Physics Category candidates, taking into account the intensified competition due to the increase in candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 11,836, with a range of 11,336–12,336.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data)
- French (English candidates only) (Foreign language oral test required).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Management Science and Engineering (Outstanding Management Talent Program) (Information Management and Information Systems (Data Intelligence and Business Analysis), Big Data Management and Application (Digital Finance and Quantitative Investment))
- French (International Politics Dual Degree) (English candidates only) (Foreign language oral test required).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Spanish (English candidates only) (Foreign language oral test required).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11,336–11,836, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a sprint and Tier 3 as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11,336), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Data Science and Big Data Technology; for rankings close to the upper limit of the range (12,336), it is recommended to focus on relatively easy-to-enter majors like Spanish.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 466 → 525 → 802 → 1305 → 1262, showing a clear trend of moving backward. From 2021 to 2024, the cumulative backward shift was about 839 places, with a slight recovery of about 43 places in 2025 compared to 2024, resulting in a baseline ranking of approximately 1262. The enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning Province was 3 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 5 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 4, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a reduction of about 20%, increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai International Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 93rd in 2021 → 82nd in 2025 → 81st in 2026, showing a continuous slight upward trend, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2022, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, while in 2026 its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee dispute), with overall public opinion stable. Its Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot), and it ranked 7th in 2022 (very hot). Although popularity has declined in recent years, it remains relatively hot, with moderate application attention. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly matching the university's History Category majors (French, Spanish, Business English, etc.), strongly attracting language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors were assessed as "generally wait-and-see" in the 2024 major popularity analysis, with neutral popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Liaoning Province is approximately 53,200 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight decrease from 56,300 in 2025, leading to a small reduction in the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 20% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the rise in university ranking, and the relatively hot Douyin popularity, along with the mitigating effect of a slight decrease in total candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 1126, with a range of 844–1408.
